title: Claude 5.1 Confirmed: What Happens After The Fable 5 Ban?
summary: A YouTube video claiming Claude 5 (Fable) was banned 76 hours after launch due to government intervention following capability discoveries. The video discusses alleged performance metrics (80.3% on SWE-Bench Pro, 65 on AA Intelligence Index), secret throttling, and theories about competitive dynamics and executive leverage.
writeup: The video claims that Claude 5, referred to as Fable, reached high benchmark scores before a 76-hour U.S. government ban, and it alleges covert capability throttling and regulatory pressure behind that ban. It speculates on competitive rankings among Claude, GPT-5.5, Gemini, and DeepSeek models. The framing rests on unconfirmed theories about industry leverage and future restrictions, so the central claims about the ban, the throttling, and the rankings are presented as speculation rather than verified fact.
